# Luma Studios
> Design-focused agency building and managing the complete digital growth infrastructure for local businesses across the US.

## Services
- Managed website design, development, hosting, and maintenance
- Local SEO — technical, on-page, and AI-era search optimization
- Marketing automation setup (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, and similar)
- CRM configuration and sales pipeline buildout
- Lead capture integration and nurturing strategy
- Brand identity design

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://lumastudios.co/
- Managed Websites: https://lumastudios.co/managed-websites/
- SEO Services: https://lumastudios.co/services/seo-services/
- Website Design: https://lumastudios.co/services/website-design/
- Brand Identity: https://lumastudios.co/branding-projects/
- Blog: https://lumastudios.co/blog/
- Contact: https://lumastudios.co/contact/

## About
Luma Studios is based in Portland, Maine. Founded by Ivan Annikov. We work with local businesses of any size across the US that depend on local trust and local visibility.

## Contact
- Website: https://lumastudios.co
- Location: 63 Federal Street, Portland, ME 04101
